news.summary: Ultrack Systems Inc. (OTC: MJLB) has recently submitted a trademark application in the U.S. for its Better Pets product line. This new line will focus on full-spectrum pet wellness products. The company is aiming to cater to the growing market demand for pet wellness products, targeting a wide range of pet owners across the country. Ultrack Systems Inc. is optimistic about the potential success of the Better Pets line and is striving to establish a strong presence in the pet wellness industry.
news.headline: Ultrack Systems Inc. (OTC: MJLB) applies for U.S. trademark for full-spectrum pet wellness products.

news.summary: A new buy-side technology has been introduced, allowing transparent media buying for full open internet inventory. This innovation aims to streamline the process and improve efficiency across various platforms. The technology provides access to a wide range of inventory, totaling over X million ad spaces, ensuring advertisers a comprehensive reach. This move is expected to revolutionize the way media buying is conducted, making it more transparent and accessible for advertisers.
news.headline: PubMatic launches AI-powered media buying platform for transparent buying across full open internet inventory.

news.summary: In Lake Oswego, Oregon, recent data from KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. revealed key insights from their sixth annual KinderCare Confidence Index, conducted in collaboration with The Harris Poll. The study, based on national data, emphasized the crucial role of quality child care in improving parental well-being and mental health. According to the findings, parents are experiencing elevated levels of stress and anxiety in their efforts to achieve "perfect parenting." The survey highlighted the significant impact of access to high-quality child care services in alleviating these pressures. This information comes from KinderCare, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol KLC.
news.headline: 90% of parents say good child care boosts their well-being; survey by KinderCare & The Harris Poll reveals.

news.summary: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., a leader in groundbreaking life-support and diagnostic technologies, revealed today that the INSPIRA™ ART100 device has received approval from Israel's primary healthcare provider for clinical testing. The device will undergo validation by top physicians for use in organ transplant surgeries. To facilitate this, Inspira will introduce the FDA-approved INSPIRA ART100 system at a prestigious medical facility in Israel associated with the biggest healthcare provider in the country.
news.headline: Inspira's INSPIRA ART100 approved for clinical validation by Israel's largest healthcare provider for organ transplants.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in San Diego, ViroMissile was acknowledged as the leading Cancer Destroying Platform for 2025 by "Life Sciences Review" magazine. The innovative biotech company based in San Diego is revolutionizing cancer treatment through its Intravenously administered technology. This recognition highlights ViroMissile's significant impact on the field of oncology, showcasing its dedication to advancing cancer treatment methods.
news.headline: ViroMissile's IDOV™ Platform named Top Cancer Destroying Platform 2025 by "Life Sciences Review" magazine. A potential one-shot cure for cancer, the biotech firm in San Diego is revolutionizing cancer treatment.

news.summary: In San Diego on May 7, 2025, it was reported that Barbachano International (BIP) has achieved a significant milestone by securing the 8th position on Forbes' renowned list of America's Best Executive Recruiting Firms for the second consecutive year. The company has climbed two spots from the previous year, solidifying its position among the top 10 firms in the industry. A notable mention was made regarding BIP's remarkable progress over the years, as it moved up from #155 eight years ago to its current ranking.
news.headline: Barbachano International rises to #8 on Forbes' Top Executive Search Firms List, climbing from #155 in just 8 years.

news.summary: In Madison Heights, Michigan, on May 7, 2025, Sanders®, a renowned caramel and chocolate confection brand, is commemorating its 150th anniversary by introducing the White Chocolate Sea Salt Caramel line as part of the festivities. The company is celebrating this significant achievement with the launch of this new collection.
news.headline: Sanders® marks 150 years with new products like White Chocolate Sea Salt Caramel, NYC experience, food truck tour.

news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, on May 7, 2025, Peabody College at Vanderbilt University will celebrate the centennial anniversary of presenting the inaugural Algernon Sydney Sullivan Award at a higher education institution. The award will be bestowed upon a standout graduating senior, continuing the tradition established almost a century ago.
news.headline: Vanderbilt University celebrates 100 years of Algernon Sydney Sullivan Award, an award given to an exceptional graduate.

news.summary: Brandey Lorensen has been appointed as President and Chief Operating Officer, and Matt Bramson has joined as Chief Revenue Officer of Frontline Group. The Seattle-based company, specializing in AI-augmented customer experience and business process outsourcing services, made the announcement on May 7, 2025. Lorensen's promotion and Bramson's new role highlight Frontline Group's commitment to enhancing its leadership team as they continue to grow and innovate in the industry.
news.headline: Frontline Group promotes Brandey Lorensen to President and COO, appoints Matt Bramson as CRO to enhance growth and innovation.

news.summary: CRISPR Therapeutics AG (NASDAQ: CRSP) reported a Q1 loss on Tuesday, with a quarterly loss of $1.58 per share, exceeding market expectations of $1.21 per share in losses. The company disclosed sales of $865,000 for the period. Despite the loss, the company remains committed to executing strategic priorities and advancing its innovative therapy portfolio. Initial data from the Phase 1 trial for CTX310 has shown promise in utilizing the in vivo gene editing platform to provide groundbreaking treatment for patients with severe cardiovascular conditions. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analysts slash CRISPR Therapeutics forecasts after Q1 results. Quarterly loss of $1.58 per share vs estimated $1.21. Sales of $865,000.

news.summary: Express Wash Concepts (EWC) revealed the inauguration of its ninth Clean Express Auto Wash site in Toledo at 5175 Airport Highway on May 7, 2025. This new addition joins the existing 113 express wash locations in cities like Toledo, Detroit, and Cleveland.
news.headline: Express Wash Concepts opens 9th Clean Express Auto Wash in Toledo at 5175 Airport Highway, offering free washes May 9-18 across 113 express wash sites in Toledo, Detroit, and Cleveland.

news.summary: The company's goal is to increase Bitcoin exposure per share in the long term, utilizing innovative financial tactics not commonly employed by other Bitcoin treasury companies. This strategy is designed to enhance value for common equity shareholders. Further information can be found in the slide presentation accessible at...
news.headline: Strive Asset Management merging with Asset Entities (NASDAQ: ASST) to form first publicly traded asset management Bitcoin treasury company. Aim to increase Bitcoin exposure per share with novel strategies. Details in slide presentation.

news.summary: Two-time winner of the BRIN Series, Matthew Brunken, discloses his science-based routine to maintain peak performance, featuring hydrogen water, Baja Gold salt, and precise fueling. In LINCOLN, Neb., on May 7, 2025, the elite runner reveals how he tackles challenges like blisters and lactic acid to secure victory on the podium.
news.headline: Nebraska's Matthew Brunken overcomes Crohn's Disease to win silver at Garmin Half Marathon with science-driven regimen.

news.summary: Today, a cutting-edge AI fintech startup called TomoCredit, established by immigrants, revealed the appointment of Steve Smith as a board member. The company aims to improve credit access for countless Americans without credit history. This update follows the news in San Francisco on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: TomoCredit appoints Steve Smith, former Finicity CEO, to expand AI financial platform, enhancing credit access for Americans.

news.summary: Ahead of FastWave's anticipated U.S. pivotal trial, a feasibility study for coronary artery disease will begin. FastWave Medical, an innovative intravascular lithotripsy (IVL) startup, has received Institutional Review Board (IRB) approval to launch the study. This announcement comes from Minneapolis on May 7, 2025. The study will involve investigating the viability of FastWave's technology for treating coronary artery disease before proceeding with the pivotal trial. This development marks a significant step forward for the company in the medical industry.
news.headline: FastWave Medical gets IRB approval for Sola™ coronary laser IVL system, starting feasibility study before US pivotal trial.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency market is experiencing a positive trend at the start of the week, driven by the optimism surrounding FOMC decision and U.S.-China trade talks. Scott Bessent is set to hold high-stakes trade discussions with Chinese officials in Geneva. Key cryptocurrencies are showing gains in the past 24 hours, with Bitcoin at $97,019.52 (+3.5%), Ethereum at $1,835.66 (+3.8%), Solana at $147.51 (+3.6%), XRP at $2.14 (+2.6%), Dogecoin at $0.1732 (+5%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001286 (+4%). Important stats reveal Ethereum large transaction volume surged by 24% due to the Pectra upgrade, while Bitcoin saw a decrease of 9.4%. Santiment data displays strong Bitcoin ETF inflows reaching their highest since mid-April, with $5.13 billion entering BTC ETFs since April 16. Large holders accumulated over 81,000 BTC during the latest market activities. For detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Major cryptocurrencies are up as China announces liquidity injection ahead of Fed interest rate decision. Bitcoin at $97,019.52, +3.5% Ethereum at $1,835.66, +3.8% XRP at $2.14, +2.6% Dogecoin at $0.1732, +5%. Bitcoin ETF inflows surged to $5.13 billion since mid-April.
The RSF: 'We liberated Al-Nuhoud and will declare the liberation of Al-Obeid and will continue mission to free Sudan from the control of the SAF and their allied militias'

news.summary: The retail portfolio experienced a 10.4% increase in rental rates, while the Jem office saw a significant boost of about 13% in rental prices.
news.headline: Lendlease Global Commercial REIT's Singapore portfolio sees 10.4% retail rental reversion and 13% office rental uplift in 3Q FY2025.

news.summary: Amsterdam-based company Nebius Group, listed on NASDAQ as NBIS, has recently disclosed a significant investment in its AI data solutions business, Toloka. The investment was led by Bezos Expeditions, the investment arm of Jeff Bezos, with support from Mikhail Parakhin, CTO of Shopify. This move is a crucial development for Toloka as it seeks to expand its operations quickly and enhance its strategic direction in response to the growing worldwide need for dependable and top-notch AI data solutions.
news.headline: Bezos Expeditions leads investment in Nebius' AI data business Toloka, bolstering strategic growth. Sharpen focus amid high demand.

news.summary: In Canton, Massachusetts, Scotland County Hospital in Memphis, Missouri has successfully implemented MEDITECH's Expanse Electronic Health Record system on the cloud-based MaaS subscription model. The hospital selected Expanse to enhance patient care accessibility and quality across its non-profit district hospital and four rural health clinics in Scotland, Clark, Knox, and Schuyler counties. This move impacts healthcare services in a five-county area of Northeast Missouri, bringing modern technology to improve healthcare provision.
news.headline: Scotland County Hospital in Memphis, MO adopts MEDITECH's Expanse EHR, benefiting 5 counties with 4 rural health clinics.

news.summary: In New York on May 7, 2025, Hindus Advancing Human Rights (HAHRI), a project by HinduPACT, has lodged a formal grievance with the United Nations following the sponsorship by Pakistan of the Pahalgam massacre on April 22nd. This brutal incident resulted in the deaths of 25 Hindus, prompting widespread outrage and calls for international action.
news.headline: Complaint filed to UN accuses Pakistan of genocide against minorities; highlights 25 Hindus killed in Pahalgam massacre.

news.summary: The report "Hong Kong Data Center Market - Investment Analysis & Growth Opportunities 2025-2030" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, the Hong Kong Data Center Market held a value of USD 3.20 billion, with a projected increase to USD 4.55 billion by 2030, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.04%. Noteworthy aspects include Hong Kong's advantageous geographical position, extensive digital transformation efforts, and strong infrastructure, which contribute to its attractiveness as a data center hub.
news.headline: Hong Kong Data Center Market valued at USD 3.20B in 2024, projected to reach USD 4.55B by 2030, with 6.04% CAGR growth.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in St. Louis, Engagedly, a talent management suite powered by AI, revealed its acquisition of hiringtool.co, an applicant tracking system driven by GenAI. This system is tailored for recruiters at startups and SMEs. The acquisition is a significant advancement in Engagedly's goal to enhance its services for modern recruiters.
news.headline: Engagedly acquires hiringtool.co, a GenAI-driven ATS for startups & SMEs, marking a strategic move.

news.summary: MaxVal Group, Inc., a prominent provider of intellectual property management solutions based in Los Altos, California, shared exciting news on May 7, 2025. They announced the successful integration of Relecura's advanced artificial intelligence tools with their Symphony IP management platform. This integration marks a significant development in their services, offering clients cutting-edge technology for managing intellectual property assets. With this enhancement, MaxVal aims to streamline and enhance IP management processes, providing clients with more efficient and effective solutions.
news.headline: MaxVal integrates Relecura's AI into Symphony IP platform for advanced patent research and analysis.

news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on May 7, 2025, ArcticCollagen is set to revolutionize the marine collagen wellness industry with their upcoming product. This innovative dietary supplement will contain a potent 8,000 mg of hydrolyzed marine collagen along with 8 grams of lean protein and hyaluronic acid. This will be the first on-the-go supplement of its kind in the market, offering a unique blend geared towards supporting a healthy lifestyle.
news.headline: ArcticCollagen set to revolutionize marine collagen market with 8,000mg hydrolyzed collagen, 8g protein. #Innovation.

news.summary: The Gogo dealer network is making significant progress in generating Supplemental Type Certificates (STCs).
news.headline: Gogo approves PMA for Galileo FDX, enabling STC for midsize and larger planes. Dealer network progressing STC generation.

news.summary: Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: OPTX), based in Rochester, New York, revealed today its support in developing non-incisional optics for enhancing near vision in clinical settings. The aim is to address refractive error correction issues, a widespread age-related vision problem impacting around 128 million individuals solely in the U.S. This initiative taps into a sizable and expanding market as the demand for solutions to this condition continues to rise. Syntec Optics is recognized for offering advanced technology products across various sectors including defense, biomedical, communications, and consumer industries.
news.headline: Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) supports near vision correction development for age-related vision issue in the US; 128M affected.

news.summary: In Racine, Wisconsin on May 7, 2025, Modine (NYSE: MOD), a renowned worldwide innovator in thermal management technology and solutions, disclosed plans to hold a conference call and webcast. This event is slated to delve into the company's financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025. Stay tuned for key insights and figures pertaining to Modine's performance during this period.
news.headline: Modine to discuss Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results in conference call on May 21, 2025. Headquarters in Racine, WI.

news.summary: In Chattanooga, Tennessee on May 7, 2025, Echelon, a prominent company in connected fitness solutions, has introduced StrengthIQ™, an innovative smart strength training ecosystem. This system offers adaptive and personalized workouts suitable for all fitness levels. The program is designed to provide tailored exercises to users in order to enhance their fitness experience.
news.headline: Echelon Fitness launches StrengthIQ™ for personalized strength training workouts. Chattanooga, Tenn. May 7, 2025.

news.summary: As of May 7, 2025, AMFM Healthcare has extended its coverage to provide insurance-friendly treatment options for adults and teenagers throughout Orange County, California. This leading provider offers evidence-based residential and outpatient services for mood and thought disorders. This expansion will reach a significant number of individuals in need of mental health support, furthering their mission to deliver high-quality care to those struggling with these conditions.
news.headline: AMFM Healthcare partners with Aetna in California, offering mental health services statewide. - 97 characters

news.summary: In recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2.5% in the last quarter, bringing the total number of unemployed individuals to 3.7 million. This rise has been attributed to the ongoing economic challenges faced by various sectors, with the service and manufacturing industries being the hardest hit. Additionally, it has been noted that the number of job vacancies has decreased by 15% compared to the previous year, indicating a shrinking job market. As a result, the government is implementing measures to stimulate job creation and support those affected by the rising unemployment rate. The situation is being closely monitored, and further updates are expected in the upcoming months.
news.headline: Barrick surpasses expectations with output meeting high end of guidance range.

news.summary: Navy Federal Credit Union, headquartered in Vienna, Virginia, has established a new Military Affairs and Strategic Partnership business division. This new unit will be overseen by retired US Navy Capt. Keith Hoskins and was officially launched on May 1, 2025. The initiative aims to bolster Navy Federal's assistance for individuals serving in the military, veterans, and their families. President and CEO Dietrich Kuhlmann emphasized that Navy Federal remains committed to the financial stability of its 14 million members worldwide.
news.headline: Navy Federal Credit Union forms Military Affairs unit led by Retired Capt. Hoskins; aims to enhance support for military members.

news.summary: In Seattle, the number of homes for sale in Washington, D.C. listed on the NASDAQ under RDFN surged by 25.1% compared to the previous year, marking the highest level since 2022 during the four weeks ending April 27. This increase is the largest on record. Redfin, a technology-driven real estate brokerage, released this data. In contrast, active listings across the country increased by 14.2%, showing the smallest rise since March 2024. Additionally, new listings in Washington, D.C. saw an 11.4% year-over-year increase, reaching a new high.
news.headline: Washington, D.C. housing inventory sees record 25% jump in active listings, highest since 2022. Nationwide increase at 14.2%.

news.summary: In Hawthorne, California, OSI Systems, Inc. disclosed that their Security division secured a contract worth around $36 million. The deal involves providing airport screening solutions to a well-known international airport in the Middle East. The package includes the deployment and maintenance of the Orion® 920CT for checkpoint screening along with the Rapiscan® TRS™ for examining carry-on items.
news.headline: OSI Systems wins $36M contract to provide aviation security systems to Middle Eastern airport.

news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Md., and Oakland, Calif., GeneDx (Nasdaq: WGS) has finalized its acquisition of Fabric Genomics, a leading company in AI-driven genomic interpretation. This acquisition marks a significant move in the field, combining GeneDx's expertise with Fabric Genomics' cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: GeneDx (Nasdaq: WGS) completes acquisition of Fabric Genomics, an AI-powered genomics firm.

news.summary: In Kawanishi City, Japan, on May 7, 2025, it was reported that environmental challenges stemming from population growth are escalating globally. Issues include climate change, global warming, depletion of natural resources, deforestation, water scarcity, and plastic pollution. The latter especially is a pressing concern, with **statistics** showing a rise in plastic waste harming ecosystems. Environmental experts urge immediate action to address these critical issues and safeguard the planet for future generations.
news.headline: Green Science Alliance developed water-based natural biomass base coat nail polish with repairing, strengthening ingredients.Addressing environmental problems caused by population explosion: climate change, global warming, resource depletion, deforestation, water shortage, and plastic pollution.

news.summary: OneUnited Bank, the largest Black-owned bank in America and a notable Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI), has revealed details of its 15th Annual "I Got Bank!" National Financial...event. In an exciting offer, the bank is providing a free e-book titled "I Got Bank" along with a grand prize of $1,000 each to 10 lucky winners. This event aims to promote financial literacy and empowerment among individuals.
news.headline: OneUnited Bank's 15th "I Got Bank" contest offers $1,000 to 10 winners plus free e-book for youth.

news.summary: In WALTHAM, MA, CallMiner, a top provider of AI-driven conversation intelligence to enhance customer experience, unveiled major enhancements to CallMiner AI Assist. These improvements expand on the agentic AI framework introduced in October 2024. The updates revolutionize how companies leverage natural language to transform customer interaction data into actionable insights. This accelerates processes and enables more informed business choices with minimal human involvement.
news.headline: CallMiner enhances AI Assist for organizations to gain insights from customer conversations, accelerating workflows with minimal human intervention.

news.summary: Trullion, a prominent provider of AI-driven accounting and audit solutions, has introduced Trulli, an innovative AI assistant aimed at aiding finance experts through tasks such as workflow automation, document scrutiny, and policy comprehension. Trulli is tailored to streamline intricate accounting processes, lessening the workload for professionals who frequently dedicate numerous hours to cross-referencing policy papers and agreements while facing tight deadlines.
news.headline: Trullion launches Trulli, an AI assistant for accountants to automate workflows and document analysis, easing burden on professionals.

news.summary: A new book titled "Smoke & Oak: The Shared Legacy of Bourbon and Cigars – An American Story of Craft, Culture & the Science of a Perfect Pairing" by Sebastian Saviano is set to be released on May 28, 2025. The American Cigar Press disclosed the news on May 7, 2025, via PRNewswire. This book explores the intertwined history of bourbon and cigars, highlighting the art, culture, and scientific elements that make them a perfect match.
news.headline: New book "Smoke & Oak" by Sebastian Saviano explores Bourbon-Cigar pairings, releasing May 28, 2025. American Cigar Press presents.

news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (symbol: ICE), a prominent worldwide technology and data services provider, unveiled the ICE Global Climate Risk Solution in both New York and Atlanta. This groundbreaking offering, an extension of their geospatial platform, now offers coverage for assets on a global scale. By utilizing data on the footprints of more than 1.6 billion buildings across the world, this solution provides risk assessments aligned with potential scenarios, along with proactive metrics on climate-related risks concerning physical and transitional factors.
news.headline: ICE expands geospatial platform to include 20,000 global corporates & sovereigns. Launches ICE Global Climate Risk Solution with data on 1.6B buildings.

news.summary: In Joliet, Illinois, on May 7, 2025, Dr. Green Services is aiding lawns in Illinois and Northwest Indiana post-winter by addressing soil compaction, a significant issue in the region. The company offers a more efficient solution to this challenge, with a focus on enhancing turf health and vitality. This initiative comes at a time when lawns are transitioning from winter damage to preparing for a damp spring season.
news.headline: Dr. Green Services introduces Liquid Aeration to improve lawns in Illinois and NW Indiana amid tough turf conditions.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in New York, there is speculation about the possibility of the US transitioning to a different monetary system, potentially shifting away from the Dollar as the global reserve currency. This has raised concerns about a potential dismantling of The Bretton Woods System. Analysts are debating the repercussions this could have on the future of the US economy. R. Christopher Whalen is among those closely monitoring the situation for further developments.
news.headline: Wall Street insider questions if US debt will lead to new monetary system, US Dollar being replaced as global reserve currency.

news.summary: In a recent announcement made in San Francisco, Sigma, a prominent analytics platform with distinctive cloud data platform writeback abilities, introduced Fred Studer as its new Chief Marketing Officer. Studer's appointment comes as Sigma strengthens its generative intelligence interface, Ask Sigma, and enhances its top-notch platform features. With a focus on driving pipeline growth, Studer will play a key role in promoting Sigma's advanced technology offerings.
news.headline: Sigma appoints Fred Studer as CMO to support marketing efforts for platform expansion, focusing on generative intelligence interface Ask Sigma.

news.summary: Riskified Ltd. (NYSE: RSKD), a prominent player in ecommerce fraud and risk intelligence, disclosed that its management will be participating in investor meetings at two upcoming conferences. This includes the J.P. Morgan 53rd Annual Technology, Media and Communications Conference in Boston on May 15th at 10:40 AM ET, and the Barclays 15th Annual Emerging Payments and FinTech Forum in New York on May 20th at 1:50 PM ET. Both events will have live webcasts, and recordings will be available for later viewing.
news.headline: Riskified will present at conferences including J.P. Morgan Tech Conf. on May 15th and Barclays' FinTech Forum on May 20th.

news.summary: In Baltimore, Sinclair, a prominent media company, along with its branch Tennis Channel, the primary U.S. tennis media hub, unveiled an unprecedented collaboration with the ATP, WTA, and certain U.S.-based tennis events. This pioneering deal offers a unified platform for brands to connect with tennis enthusiasts across various mediums like in-person, on television, and online, ensuring a consistent brand message throughout the season. This partnership marks a significant step towards enhancing viewer engagement and marketing opportunities within the tennis sphere.
news.headline: Sinclair & Tennis Channel partners with ATP, WTA, US tennis tournaments for groundbreaking sponsorship, offering brand engagement across all platforms.
Bondi: US Secretary of State Rubio has spoken with counterparts from India & Pakistan.

news.summary: Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. shared that they will disclose their financial and operating results for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Monday, May 12, 2025. A conference call led by management is scheduled for the next day, May 13, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET to review the outcomes. To join the call, individuals can dial (800) 715-9871 within the U.S. or +1 (646) 307-1963 internationally, using the reference "Infinity." The Company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol INR.
news.headline: Infinity Natural Resources will release first quarter 2025 results on May 12, with a conference call on May 13 at 10:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Morristown, New Jersey on May 7, 2025, Hepion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:HEPA), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for liver diseases, has announced a significant business move. They have finalized a binding letter of intent with New Day Diagnostics LLC to acquire diagnostic tests for various conditions. These conditions include celiac disease, respiratory multiplex (Covid/Influenza A/B and RSV), helicobacter pylori (H. pylori), and hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). Notably, the celiac, respiratory multiplex, and H. pylori tests have received CE marks and are authorized for sale in Europe currently.
news.headline: Hepion Pharmaceuticals partners with New Day Diagnostics to commercialize tests for celiac disease, respiratory issues, H. pylori, and HCC in Europe.
